name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Mutex ----
EXTENDS Naturals

VARIABLES proc, state

N == 3

Init ==
    proc = 1 /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next =

        proc' = proc + 1
        state' = [state EXCEPT ![proc] = "critical", 
                   ![IF proc = N THEN 1 ELSE proc + 1] = "idle"]

        UNCHANGED proc, state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

TypeOK ==
    proc \in 1..N /\ state \in [i \in 1..N |-> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

MutualExclusion == Cardinality({i \in 1..N | state[i] = "critical"}) <= 1

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Coordinator, Participants, None

VARIABLES state, votes

Init ==
    state = "Start" /\ votes = [p \in Participants |-> None]

Prepare ==
    state = "Start" /\ state' = "Prepare" /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "Prepared" |-> p \in Participants]

VoteYes ==
    state = "Prepare" /\ votes[p] = "Prepared" /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "Yes"]

VoteNo ==
    state = "Prepare" /\ votes[p] = "Prepared" /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "No"]

AllYes ==
    state = "Prepare" /\ \A p \in Participants: votes[p] = "Yes"

AllNo ==
    state = "Prepare" /\ \A p \in Participants: votes[p] = "No"

DecideCommit ==
    state = "Prepare" /\ AllYes /\ state' = "Commit"

DecideAbort ==
    state = "Prepare" /\ (NOT AllYes) /\ state' = "Abort"

Next == Prepare \/ VoteYes \/ VoteNo \/ DecideCommit \/ DecideAbort

vars == <<state, votes>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK ==
    state \in {"Start", "Prepare", "Commit", "Abort"} /\ votes \in [Participants -> {"Prepared", "Yes", "No", None}]

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals

VARIABLES forks, state

N == 5

Init ==
    forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i] /\ 
    state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

PickUp(i) ==
    LET left == i
        right == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1
    IN forks[left] = left /\ forks[right] = right /\ 
       state[i] = "hungry" /\ 
       state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"] /\ 
       forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![left] = i, ![right] = i]

PutDown(i) ==
    LET left == i
        right == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1
    IN state[i] = "eating" /\ 
       state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"] /\ 
       forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![left] = left, ![right] = right]

Next == \E i \in 1..N : PickUp(i) \/ PutDown(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK ==
    /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

VARIABLES num, flag, p

Procs == 1..N

Init ==
    num = [p \in Procs |-> 0] /\ flag = [p \in Procs |-> FALSE]

TakeTicket(p) ==
    LET max_num == IF num[p] = 0 THEN 0 ELSE MAX num
    IN num' = [num EXCEPT ![p] = max_num + 1] /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]

Enter(p) ==
    p' = p /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = FALSE]

Exit(p) ==
    num' = [num EXCEPT ![p] = 0] /\ flag' = flag

Next ==
    \E p \in Procs : TakeTicket(p) \/ Enter(p) \/ Exit(p)

vars == <<num, flag, p>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK ==
    num \in [Procs -> 0..N] /\ flag \in [Procs -> BOOLEAN] /\ p \in Procs

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Naturals

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, size

Init == 
    q = <<>> /\ size = 0

Produce ==
    size < K /\ q' = Append(q, size) /\ size' = size + 1

Consume ==
    size > 0 /\ q' = Tail(q) /\ size' = size - 1

Next == Produce \/ Consume

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

vars == {q, size}

TypeOK == size \in 0..K /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1)

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS State

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state, peers

State = {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init ==
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = NULL
    /\ state = "Follower"
    /\ peers = {1,2,3} \ {currentTerm}

BecomeFollower(t) ==
    /\ state = "Follower"
    /\ currentTerm = t
    /\ votedFor = NULL

BecomeCandidate ==
    /\ state = "Follower"
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
    /\ votedFor' = self
    /\ state' = "Candidate"

Vote(v) ==
    /\ state = "Candidate"
    /\ votedFor = self
    /\ v \in peers
    /\ votedFor' = v
    /\ state' = "Follower"

BecomeLeader ==
    /\ state = "Candidate"
    /\ votesReceived = currentTerm
    /\ state' = "Leader"

Next ==
    \/ BecomeFollower(SomeTerm)
    \/ BecomeCandidate
    \/ Vote(SomePeer)
    \/ BecomeLeader

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK ==
    /\ currentTerm \in 0..100
    /\ votedFor \in peers \/ {NULL}
    /\ state \in State

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RWLock ----
EXTENDS Naturals

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
    readers = 0 /\ writer_active = FALSE

ReadStart == 
    /\ writer_active = FALSE
    /\ readers' = readers + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

ReadEnd == 
    /\ readers > 0
    /\ readers' = readers - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

WriteStart == 
    /\ readers = 0
    /\ writer_active = FALSE
    /\ writer_active' = TRUE
    /\ UNREADABLE readers'

ReadEndWriteEnd == 
    /\ writer_active = TRUE
    /\ writer_active' = FALSE
    /\ UNCHANGED readers

Next == ReadStart \/ ReadEnd \/ WriteStart \/ ReadEndWriteEnd

vars == <<readers, writer_active>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
    /\ readers \in 0..1000
    /\ writer_active \in {FALSE, TRUE}

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

VARIABLES N, states, incoming, outgoing, channel

Init ==
    /\ N = 5
    /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ incoming = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]
    /\ outgoing = [i \in 1..N |-> {j \in 1..N |-> j # i}]
    /\ channel = [ (i, j) \in N \times N |-> {} ]

Send(msg, src, dst) ==
    channel' = [channel EXCEPT !src..dst = Append(channelsrc..dst, msg)]
    /\ UNCHANGED states, incoming, outgoing

Receive(dst) ==
    LET src \in 1..N : Head(channelsrc..dst) IN
    /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT !src..dst = Tail(channelsrc..dst)]
    /\ IF msg = "marker" THEN
          states' = [states EXCEPT ![dst] = 1]
          incoming' = [incoming EXCEPT ![dst] = {}]
          outgoing' = [outgoing EXCEPT ![dst] = {}]
          /\ UNCHANGED states, incoming, outgoing

          states' = [states EXCEPT ![dst] = states[dst] + 1]
          incoming' = [incoming EXCEPT ![dst] = incoming[dst] \ {msg}]
          UNCHANGED outgoing

Next ==
    \E src, dst \in 1..N, msg \in {"marker", "data"} :
        IF msg = "marker" THEN Send(msg, src, dst)


Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

vars == <<N, states, incoming, outgoing, channel>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ N \in Nat
    /\ states \in [1..N -> Nat]
    /\ incoming \in [1..N -> FiniteSetOf(Nat)]
    /\ outgoing \in [1..N -> FiniteSetOf(1..N)]
    /\ channel \in [N \times N -> FiniteSetOf(Nat)]

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Naturals

VARIABLE token

Init == token = 1

PassToken == token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

SendMessage == PASS

Next == PassToken

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_token

TypeOK == token \in 1..N

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLE store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Put(k, v) == store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v] /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Get(k) == /\ k \in Keys
          /\ RETURN store[k]

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Put(k, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values \cup {NULL}]

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS None
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen

N == 3
M == 2

Init ==
    /\ acceptors = [a \in 1..N |-> [proposal \in None, value \in None]]
    /\ promises = [a \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ accepts = [a \in 1..N |-> None]
    /\ chosen = None

Propose(v) ==
    /\ v \in 1..10
    /\ VAR proposer
    /\ proposer \in 1..M
    /\ new_ballot = Max(promises) + 1
    /\ promises' = [promises EXCEPT ![proposer] = new_ballot]
    /\ UNCHANGED acceptors, accepts, chosen

AcceptPhase ==
    /\ VAR proposer, new_ballot, v
    /\ proposer \in 1..M
    /\ new_ballot = Max(promises) + 1
    /\ promises' = [promises EXCEPT ![proposer] = new_ballot]
    /\ accepts' = [accepts EXCEPT ![proposer] = v]
    /\ UNCHANGED acceptors, chosen

Choose ==
    /\ chosen = None
    /\ vals = Set(accepts[1..N])
    /\ vals # {}
    /\ chosen' = CHOOSE v \in vals
    /\ UNCHANGED acceptors, promises, accepts

Next == PseudoPropose \/ AcceptPhase \/ Choose

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK ==
    /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [proposal: Nat, value: Nat]]
    /\ promises \in [1..N -> Nat]
    /\ accepts \in [1..N -> Nat \cup {None}]
    /\ chosen \in Nat \cup {None}

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES

VARIABLES chunk, retransmit_count, status

Init ==
    chunk \in File /\ retransmit_count = 0 /\ status = "sending"

Send ==
    /\ chunk \in File
    /\ retransmit_count <= MAX_RETRIES
    /\ UNCHANGED File

Receive ==
    /\ chunk \in File
    /\ status = "sending"
    /\ chunk' = chunk
    /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count
    /\ status' = "received"

Timeout ==
    /\ status = "sending"
    /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count + 1
    /\ status' = IF retransmit_count' > MAX_RETRIES THEN "failed" ELSE "sending"

Next == Send \/ Receive \/ Timeout

vars == <<chunk, retransmit_count, status>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK ==
    /\ chunk \in File
    /\ retransmit_count \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
    /\ status \in {"sending", "received", "failed"}

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

VARIABLES db, txs, active

Init ==
    db = [x \in {"a", "b"} |-> 0] /\
    txs = {} /\
    active = {}

BeginTx(t) ==
    t \notin active /\ t \notin DOMAIN txs /\ txs' = txs \cup {t} /\ active' = active \cup {t}

Read(t, k) ==
    k \in DOMAIN txs /\ t \in active /\ k \in DOMAIN txs[t] /\ txs'[t][k] = txs[t][k]

Write(t, k, v) ==
    t \in active /\ k \in {"a", "b"} /\ txs'[t] = txs[t] \cup {k -> v}

Commit(t) ==
    t \in active /\ LET writes == k \in DOMAIN txs[t] IN
        /\ db' = [db EXCEPT ![k] = txs[t][k] FOR k \in writes]
        /\ txs' = txs \ {t}
        /\ active' = active \ {t}

Abort(t) ==
    t \in active /\ txs' = txs /\ active' = active \ {t}

Next ==
    \E t \in {"T1", "T2"}:
        IF BeginTx(t)
        THEN BeginTx(t)

        THEN Read(t, k)

        THEN Write(t, k, v)

        THEN Commit(t)

        THEN Abort(t)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK ==
    /\ db \in [ {"a", "b"} |-> 1..10 ]
    /\ txs \in [ {"T1", "T2"} -> [ {"a", "b"} |-> 1..10 ] ]
    /\ active \subseteq {"T1", "T2"}

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Naturals

VARIABLES clocks

N == 5
epsilon == 1

Init == 
    /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]

SyncStep(i) ==
    LET new_val == ROUND(AVG([j \in 1..N |-> clocks[j]]))
    IN clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = new_val] /\ UNCHANGED {j \in 1..N \ {i}}

Next == \E i \in 1..N : SyncStep(i)

MaxDiff == MAX(clocks) - MIN(clocks)

TypeOK == \E c \in clocks : c \in 1..N

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_clocks

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Naturals

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init ==
    flag = [1 |-> FALSE, 2 |-> FALSE] /\ turn = 1

Enter(i) ==
    flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE] /\ turn' = j /\ flag = [flag EXCEPT ![j] = FALSE] /\ UNCHANGED turn

Exit(i) ==
    flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE] /\ UNCHANGED turn

Next == \E i \in {1, 2} : Enter(i) \/ Exit(i)

vars == <<flag, turn>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK ==
    flag \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN] /\ turn \in {1, 2}

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected


Init ==
    known = {} /\ infected = {}

Spread ==
    LET new_infected == infected \cup known IN
        infected' = new_infected /\ known' = new_infected

Next == Spread

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_variables

TypeOK ==
    /\ known \subseteq 1..N
    /\ infected \subseteq known

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Alloc ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES free, allocated

PageSet == 1..N
ClientSet == 1..N

Init ==
    free = PageSet /\ allocated = [c \in ClientSet |-> {}]

RequestPage(c) ==
    /\ c \in ClientSet
    /\ free /= {}
    /\ p \in free
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
    /\ free' = free \ {p}
    /\ UNCHANGED other variables

ReleasePage(c, p) ==
    /\ c \in ClientSet
    /\ p \in allocated[c]
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
    /\ free' = free \cup {p}
    /\ UNCHANGED other variables

Next == \E c \in ClientSet : RequestPage(c) \/ \E p \in allocated[c] : ReleasePage(c, p)

vars == <<free, allocated>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK ==
    free \subseteq PageSet /\ allocated \in [ClientSet -> SUBSET PageSet] /\ \forall c \in ClientSet : allocated[c] \subseteq PageSet

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SingleBroker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences
CONSTANTS Publisher, Subscriber, Topic

VARIABLES subscribers, messages, deliver_seq

Init ==
    subscribers  = [t \in Topic |-> {}] /\ 
    messages     = <<>> /
    deliver_seq  = 0

Register(sub, topic) ==
    /\ sub \in Subscriber
    /\ topic \in Topic
    /\ subscribers[topic] = subscribers[topic] \cup {sub}
    /\ UNCHANGED messages /\ deliver_seq

Publish(pub, topic, msg) ==
    /\ pub \in Publisher
    /\ topic \in Topic
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, [pub |-> pub, topic |-> topic, msg |-> msg])
    /\ deliver_seq' = deliver_seq + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED subscribers

Deliver ==
    /\ deliver_seq > 0
    /\ msg = messages[deliver_seq]
    /\ deliver_seq' = deliver_seq + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED subscribers

vars == <<subscribers, messages, deliver_seq>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Publish \/ Register \/ Deliver]_vars

TypeOK ==
    /\ subscribers \in [Topic -> SUBSET Subscriber]
    /\ messages \in Seq(PublishMsg)
    /\ deliver_seq \in 0..Len(messages)

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Naturals

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init ==
    /\ turn = 0
    /\ wants = [1 |-> FALSE, 2 |-> FALSE]

    LET q == IF p = 1 THEN 2 ELSE 1 IN
    /\ wants[p] = TRUE
    /\ turn = p
    /\ wants[p] = FALSE
    /\ wants[q] = FALSE

Next ==
    \E p \in {1, 2} :
        /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
        /\ turn' = p
        /\ UNCHANGED wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_variables

TypeOK ==
    /\ turn \in {1, 2}
    /\ wants \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Nodes

VARIABLES counts

Init ==
    counts = [i \in Nodes |>
                [j \in Nodes |> 0]]

Increment(n) ==
    LET new_counts == [i \in Nodes |>
                      IF i = n THEN counts[i][j] + 1 ELSE counts[i][j] ]
    IN counts' = new_counts

Merge(c1, c2) ==
    LET merged == [i \in Nodes |>
                  [j \in Nodes |> MAX(c1[i][j], c2[i][j]) ] ]
    IN counts' = merged

Next == \E n \in Nodes : Increment(n)

TotalCount == SUM i \in Nodes : MAX(counts[i][j] : j \in Nodes)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_counts

TypeOK == counts \in [Nodes -> [Nodes -> Nat]]
